privileged_info_summary: The expected output path is verified to be /home/ga/DICOM/exports/split_view.png based on the export_result.sh script and task description. The environment uses real DICOM samples downloaded from Rubo Medical. The task claims to be verified by verifier.py, but this script is entirely missing from the task directory. Consequently, the minimum file size, width, and height thresholds in the metadata are completely unenforced.
